overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Kronenwetter Plan Commission was scheduled to hold a meeting to consider a conditional use permit for a residential food truck kitchen operation, review a site plan for a property development project, and conduct routine business including approval of previous meeting minutes and selection of a vice chairperson.

agenda.item: Conditional Use Permit (Joseph Fleming) - Residential Business (Kitchen and food truck operation) at 1755 Pine Road
Approval of Minutes from April 8, 2026 Plan Commission Meeting
Introduction of new Plan Commission members
Staffing for the Plan Commission - Community Development Director position update
Site Plan for Premier Property Development (Vinnie Tesch) at 1190 Gardner Park Road
American Asphalt Conditional Use Permit Renewal

discussions.body: The commission was scheduled to hold a public hearing and consider a conditional use permit request from Joseph Fleming for a residential business involving a kitchen and food truck operation at 1755 Pine Road (Tax Parcel ID: 145-2707-013-0054). The property comprises 0.97 acres and is legally described as Plantation Acres Lot 1 & 2 Block 2.

discussions.item: Introduction of new Plan Commission members
discussions.body: The commission was set to introduce new members to the Plan Commission during the reports and discussions portion of the meeting.
The commission was scheduled to review and discuss the duties and responsibilities of Plan Commission members.
The commission was expected to receive an update on how the Community Development Director position was being filled.

discussions.item: Site Plan for Premier Property Development
discussions.body: The commission was scheduled to review a site plan for a Premier Property Development project located at 1190 Gardner Park Road, involving Parcel 1 of CSM 8726-34-104 in the Village of Kronenwetter.
The commission was set to consider a conditional use permit renewal for American Asphalt.
The commission was scheduled to review the concept plan for the Green Tree Subdivision.
The commission was expected to select a vice chairperson during the new business portion of the meeting.

publicComment: Public comment was scheduled for up to 15 minutes total, with a three-minute time period per person and possible time extension at the Chief Presiding Officer's discretion.
actionItems: Expected to approve or take action on April 8, 2026 Plan Commission Meeting minutes
Scheduled to vote on the conditional use permit request from Joseph Fleming for a residential food truck kitchen operation
Set to review and take possible action on the Premier Property Development site plan
Expected to consider the American Asphalt conditional use permit renewal
Scheduled to review the Green Tree Subdivision Concept Plan
Expected to select a new vice chairperson
title: Plan Commission Meeting - 2026-05-18
